description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs named build and test, each using the python:3 Docker image. In the build stage run a before_script that installs setuptools and m2r via pip, then execute python setup.py sdist to create a source distribution. In the test stage run a before_script that installs the project requirements and pytest with pytest-cov, then run pytest --cov-report term-missing --cov=./src/ ./tests/ and capture coverage using the regex /TOTAL\s+\d+\s+\d+\s+(\d+\%)/. Both jobs use the default test stage ordering, with build running before test.
